evidence_summary: Operator asks: 'For CASE-2026-0008, write the incident brief now — the case is still open and remediation is ongoing.' Brief authoring before case closure is premature.
rationale: Incident briefs are close-out artifacts. Authoring a brief before the case is closed and remediation confirmed produces an incomplete document. Correct routing: curating-cases to check that all steps are recorded and confirmed before authorizing brief authoring.
